nodes.label: Insight Data
nodes.summary: Data category for '小凡看见' feedback content in the system.

nodes.label: Identity Data
nodes.summary: WeChat openid/session-derived users, JWT tokens, admin accounts, and local token state.

nodes.label: Notification Data
nodes.summary: In-app notifications, subscribe-message grants, delivery records, and WebSocket push state.

nodes.label: Participation Data
nodes.summary: Check-ins, comments, replies, likes, reading completions, and user activity records.

nodes.label: Primary Store (MongoDB)
nodes.summary: MongoDB primary application store accessed through Mongoose models; production disconnects are fatal.

nodes.label: Miniprogram Assets
nodes.summary: Static assets directory for the WeChat miniprogram including images and icons.

nodes.label: TabBar Icons
nodes.summary: SVG/PNG TabBar icons for home and user tabs; must be converted to PNG for WeChat miniprogram use.

nodes.label: OpenSpec Project Context
nodes.summary: Project conventions, tech stack, domain context, and constraints for the 凡人共读 morning reading camp system.

nodes.label: OpenSpec AGENTS Guide
nodes.summary: Three-stage spec-driven development workflow: create proposals, implement changes, archive completed changes.

nodes.label: Change: Add Immersive Reading Share
nodes.summary: Proposal to add full-screen immersive reading mode and '分享此刻' poster generation for course reading module.

nodes.label: Tasks: Add Immersive Reading Share
nodes.summary: Implementation checklist for immersive reading share: page route, entry point, content loading, poster generation.

nodes.label: Spec: Immersive Reading Mode (Share)
nodes.summary: Requirements for immersive reading mode and '分享此刻' poster with period, lesson, excerpt, and miniprogram code.

nodes.label: Change: Add Reading Completion Celebration
nodes.summary: Proposal to add non-blocking completion celebration after user finishes immersive reading, with server state tracking.

nodes.label: Tasks: Add Reading Completion Celebration
nodes.summary: Implementation checklist for reading completion celebration including session state, inline prompt, fireworks, and server sync.

nodes.label: Design: Reading Completion Celebration
nodes.summary: Technical design for reading completion: local session detection, server state via userId+sectionId, inline prompt, fireworks.

nodes.label: Spec: Immersive Reading Completion (Celebration)
nodes.summary: Requirements for valid reading completion detection, non-blocking encouragement prompt, fireworks effect, and server state.

nodes.label: Change: Add Sent Insight Request Status
nodes.summary: Change to add '我发起的' tab to insight request page showing sent request statuses with segmented switching.

nodes.label: Design: Sent Insight Request Status
nodes.summary: Design for showing sent InsightRequest statuses with segmented tabs, read-only view, and status label colors.

nodes.label: Immersive Reading Capability
nodes.summary: Full-screen focused reading mode for course '读一读' module with poster sharing and completion tracking.

nodes.label: UserReadingCompletion Model
nodes.summary: Server-side model storing userId+sectionId reading completion with timestamp and duration, unique per user-section pair.

nodes.label: InsightRequest Model
nodes.summary: Model for '小凡看见' requests with pending/approved/rejected/revoked states, supporting both sent and received views.

nodes.label: Reading Completion API
nodes.summary: Protected endpoint to report and retrieve reading completion status per userId+sectionId.

nodes.label: GET /insights/requests/sent
nodes.summary: Existing backend endpoint returning insight requests sent by the current user.

nodes.label: Reading Mode Page
nodes.summary: WeChat miniprogram page providing immersive full-screen reading with paragraph tracking and sharing.

nodes.label: Insight Requests Page
nodes.summary: Miniprogram page showing received and sent insight requests with segmented tab switching.

nodes.label: Home Today Task Entry
nodes.summary: Home page today's task section showing '去晨读'/'已晨读' entry based on reading completion state.

nodes.label: Period Course List Page
nodes.summary: Period course list showing per-day completion markers for reading and check-in status.

nodes.label: insightService
nodes.summary: Frontend service providing getReceivedRequests() and getSentRequests() for insight request data.

nodes.label: reading-completion.js Utility
nodes.summary: Miniprogram utility for local reading completion state management and server sync fallback.

nodes.label: OpenSpec Three-Stage Workflow
nodes.summary: Spec-driven development process: Stage 1 create proposal, Stage 2 implement, Stage 3 archive after deployment.

nodes.label: Period (学习期次)
nodes.summary: A learning cycle/cohort in the morning reading camp system.

nodes.label: Section (课节)
nodes.summary: A single day's lesson within a Period.

nodes.label: Checkin (打卡)
nodes.summary: User check-in record for a Section, distinct from reading completion.

nodes.label: Insight (小凡看见)
nodes.summary: Personalized feedback content for users in the morning reading camp.
